'''nomataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberating|liberating]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberating|liberating]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nomataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomatithi|nomatithi]] || [[word:nomatiji|nomatiji]] || [[word:nomatishi|nomatishi]] || [[word:nomatiki|nomatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomatuthuthu|nomatuthuthu]] || [[word:nomatujuju|nomatujuju]] || [[word:nomatushushu|nomatushushu]] || [[word:nomatukuku|nomatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomatuthu|nomatuthu]] || [[word:nomatuju|nomatuju]] || [[word:nomatushu|nomatushu]] || [[word:nomatuku|nomatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomatufthuf|nomatufthuf]] || [[word:nomatufjuf|nomatufjuf]] || [[word:nomatufshuf|nomatufshuf]] || [[word:nomatufkuf|nomatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomatethe|nomatethe]] || [[word:nomateje|nomateje]] || [[word:nomateshe|nomateshe]] || [[word:nomateke|nomateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomatothotho|nomatothotho]] || [[word:nomatojojo|nomatojojo]] || [[word:nomatoshosho|nomatoshosho]] || [[word:nomatokoko|nomatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomatotho|nomatotho]] || [[word:nomatojo|nomatojo]] || [[word:nomatosho|nomatosho]] || [[word:nomatoko|nomatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomatofthof|nomatofthof]] || [[word:nomatofjof|nomatofjof]] || [[word:nomatofshof|nomatofshof]] || [[word:nomatofkof|nomatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfthĂŻf|nomatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfjĂŻf|nomatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfshĂŻf|nomatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfkĂŻf|nomatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nomatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nomatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nomatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nomatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfthĂŻf|nomatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfjĂŻf|nomatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfshĂŻf|nomatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfkĂŻf|nomatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfthĂŻf|nomatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfjĂŻf|nomatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfshĂŻf|nomatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomatĂŻfkĂŻf|nomatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomatĂŠthĂŠ|nomatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nomatĂŠjĂŠ|nomatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nomatĂŠshĂŠ|nomatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nomatĂŠkĂŠ|nomatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomatathatha|nomatathatha]] || [[word:nomatajaja|nomatajaja]] || [[word:nomatashasha|nomatashasha]] || [[word:nomatakaka|nomatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomatatha|nomatatha]] || [[word:nomataja|nomataja]] || [[word:nomatasha|nomatasha]] || [[word:nomataka|nomataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomatafthaf|nomatafthaf]] || [[word:nomatafjaf|nomatafjaf]] || [[word:nomatafshaf|nomatafshaf]] || [[word:nomatafkaf|nomatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nomatasha|nomatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomatshĂ«asha|nomatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomatroasha|nomatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomatmuasha|nomatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomatyaasha|nomatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomatnkshĂ«asha|gonomatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomatnkroasha|gonomatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomatnkmuasha|gonomatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomatnkyaasha|gonomatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nomamatasha|nomamatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomamatshĂ«asha|nomamatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomamatroasha|nomamatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomamatmuasha|nomamatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomamatyaasha|nomamatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomamatnkshĂ«asha|gonomamatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomamatnkroasha|gonomamatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomamatnkmuasha|gonomamatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomamatnkyaasha|gonomamatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nemĂŠtasha|nemĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nemĂŠtshĂ«asha|nemĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nemĂŠtroasha|nemĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nemĂŠtmuasha|nemĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nemĂŠtyaasha|nemĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonemĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gonemĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonemĂŠtnkroasha|gonemĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonemĂŠtnkmuasha|gonemĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonemĂŠtnkyaasha|gonemĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nomfatasha|nomfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomfatshĂ«asha|nomfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomfatroasha|nomfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomfatmuasha|nomfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomfatyaasha|nomfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomfatnkshĂ«asha|gonomfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomfatnkroasha|gonomfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomfatnkmuasha|gonomfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomfatnkyaasha|gonomfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
